question: top 5 client par CA
sql: SELECT IDClient AS CodeClient, TRIM(NomClient) AS NomClient, SUM(ChiffreAffairesTTC) AS ChiffreAffairesTotal FROM vw_facturation_kpi_client GROUP BY IDClient, NomClient ORDER BY ChiffreAffairesTotal DESC LIMIT 5
